test_cases.input_summary: TV hard news bridge stand-up, reservoir location, 20 seconds, specific visual environment described
test_cases.notes: Script tightly written to word count. Strong location connection — would not work from a studio. Bridge function clear: picks up spokesperson's argument, lands on the critique. Production notes specific to the visual environment.

test_cases.input_summary: Radio sign-off, feature tone, 30 seconds, reporter at community event, closing a 3-minute package
test_cases.notes: Feature tone well-judged — more reflective than hard news without becoming soft. Ambient sound recommendation appropriate. Sign-off clean with reporter name and outlet. Word count matched 30-second target.

test_cases.input_summary: TV opening stand-up, investigative tone, 15 seconds, outside corporate headquarters, minimal detail provided
test_cases.notes: 15-second constraint handled well — tight, punchy opening. Investigative tone landed without overstatement. Noted limitation: with minimal location description, the script was competent but less visually anchored than the reservoir example.
